text_block_list.text:
While out walking with Meisho Doto, we stop by
the shopping district...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Huh? There's quite a crowd here. Sh-should we...
make our escape?

There's no need to up and run away. I go and
have a look for myself...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Don't let this opportunity pass you by! You there,
the Umamusume hiding in the back! Care to give
it a try?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's a raffle... But what's inside? Thinking
about it makes m-m-m-meee...

It's not like anything bad is in there. We give the
raffle a go, using our one ticket.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
So, this is a raffle machine... I'll try not to grip the
lever too hard so it doesn't snap and break off.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Don't break. Don't break... Yah!

As she repeats her funny wish, we gently turn the
lever!

A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!
You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Whaaaat?!
No doubt about it. She's blacked out.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I can't possibly accept something like this!
choice_data_list: You don't want to go to the hot springs?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I can't. I can't, I can't, I caaan't. Besides... I have
so so many races to run, and...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
How am I supposed to accept something so
wonderful?! I'm a walking disaster, always messing
things up.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
And, I promise there's a good reason why I really
can't go.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I know I'll misplace the ticket if I hold onto it. I
could lose it today, even.

...She's not wrong about that. It's very possible
she'd lose the ticket before our schedule simmers
down.
choice_data_list: Would you like me to keep it safe?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh, you... would?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Okay. I know it'll be safe in your hands, unlike in
mine.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: So... Um... I'll entrust it to you. Or...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I don't mind if you end up using it, either. It's too
much of a luxury for me, anyway.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I'm happy enough just having pulled it.

I can't use this ticket in good faith. I'll save it as a
little present for Meisho Doto.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!
You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: A d-d-d-d-deluxe carrot hamburger steak?! We got an amazing pull!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I could just... I!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Phew... I'm stuffed...
choice_data_list: You haven't even had your first bite?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's like... I'm satisfied from this wonderful
result alone.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it's great to have tried out a raffle with
someone. I don't think doing it alone would be
this fun.

It sounds like Meisho Doto doesn't have much
luck with raffles.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Um... would you let me have this hamburger steak
after our outing?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh wow... And I get to eat something delicious. This makes me so happy.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
How nice... I'm really so glad I could go out
together with you, Trainer. ♪

In the end, we split the delicious hamburger
steak, sharing a wonderful moment together.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!
You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Wow... Look, Trainer, there's lots and lots of
carrots. ♪

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
We should be just fine with this many! How
reassuring.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh? Ummm, I don't mean anything big by it...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
If you have a lot of something, you can always
redo things when you mess up.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Although, it's not like I have anything special in
mind to use them for.

From the looks of it, Meisho Doto feels more at
ease having many things as opposed to one.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, but maybe this is a good opportunity to
try something that normally scares me.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I could peel them or chop them finely for a
salad. ♪

Meisho Doto and I try a number of different ways
to prepare the carrots. Afterwards, we enjoy the
many dishes we made.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the third
prize! Here's your carrot!
You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
One carrot... Ngh, I'm so sorry, Trainer. This is all
my fault.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
If I wasn't so clumsy and had just a bit more luck
to my name...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: We would have two carrots instead!

That's Meisho Doto, always setting the bar low.
However...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Missy, I don't have a prize for two carrots. The
prize grade above yours offers much, much more.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Wh-what? Much, much more?! Is that true?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I don't stand a chance as I am now. Uugh, I'll
come try again when I'm ready.

Meisho Doto and I split the carrot in half and
nibble on it all the way home.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.
You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Tissues, tough luck... consolation prize...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I'm disappointed, but kind of relieved at
the same time.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Well, yes... I must have been feeling this was the
best I could do, more or less.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm a little at ease, seeing that things turned out
as usual.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But, but... I really shouldn't feel this way, right?
This isn't like before my debut.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I have to show my disappointment. Next time... I'll
get it next time.

Of course, she shouldn't be indifferent to drawing
the shortest straw. Let's take this disappointment
in stride.
